name: send_reply
description: Send a reply to an existing conversation message. Supports text body, attachments, and CC/BCC recipients.

parameters.name: conversation_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the conversation to reply to.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The HTML or plain text body of the reply message.
parameters.example: Thank you for reaching out. We've updated your invoice.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of reply. One of: reply, note. Defaults to reply.

body.body: Thank you for reaching out. We've updated your invoice.
